examples.english: He works in the field of technology.
I work as a teacher at the school.

examples.text: إِنَّ اللَّهَ يُدْخِلُ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ جَنَّاتٍ تَجْرِي مِن تَحْتِهَا الْأَنْهَارُ
examples.english: Allah will surely admit those who believe and do good into Gardens, under which rivers flow

senses.gloss: to pay (someone) their fee or wages
to make (someone) an administrator or governor

examples.text: الْعَمَلُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ يُمْكِنُ أَن يَكُونَ مُفِيدًا فِي إِنْجَازِ الْمُشَارِيعِ الْكَبِيرَةِ.
examples.english: Collaborative work can be beneficial in completing large projects.

etymology.text: The grammatical “government” meaning is a semantic loan from Medieval Latin vīs. Compare Hebrew עָמָל (`Amal, “work, deed”).
